news.title:
SBI faces $32M loss after unwinding $5B rupee bets due to RBI's crackdown.
RBI limits daily open currency positions to $100M; rupee down 3% YTD amid trade gap.
news.summary:

news.title:

This exposure makes SBI one of the most affected by RBI's move.

news.title:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.

news.title:
BoFA upgraded SBI to 'Buy', raising its target price to ₹1,200, citing value in large banks.
Union Bank and Bank of India downgraded to 'Neutral' due to asset quality risks; trading down up to 3%.

news.title:
RBI likely to maintain status quo on rates amid oil, inflation risks as MPC meets April 6-8, FY26.
SBI warns of rising inflation, rupee at ₹93/$, and FII outflows; CPI may stay above 4.5% for 3 quarters.

news.title:
38 firms, including SBI Funds and Manipal Health, filed IPO papers in March 2026, up from 22 in March 2025.
64 companies await SEBI approval; IPO filings surge due to issuer confidence, regulatory compliance, and market readiness.

news.title:

news.title:
Trent, IndiGo, SBI, and Adani stocks saw sharp declines as geopolitical tensions spiked oil prices to $105 per barrel.
Banking, cyclical, and auto stocks faced profit booking; FPIs sold Rs 8,331 crores amid rupee pressure and global uncertainties.

news.title:
